================================================================================
COMMENT BREAKDOWN BY CATEGORY
================================================================================

1. QUESTIONS (How to, Tools, Cost, Timeline)
   Count: 45
   Auto-Response Template: "Thanks for the question! 💡 We appreciate your interest. [CUSTOMIZED_ANSWER]"
   Examples:
   - "How do I get started with this? What tools do I need?"
   - "What's the timeline for implementation? When can I start?"
   - "How do I start building my own system like this?"

2. PRAISE (Amazing, Inspiring, Love, Great)
   Count: 48
   Auto-Response Template: "Thank you so much! 🙏 Glad this is helpful. Keep building!"
   Examples:
   - "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and well-explained. Thank you!"
   - "Love the approach here! Really impressed with the quality. Great work!"
   - "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and brilliant!"

3. SPAM (Crypto, MLM, Get Rich Quick)
   Count: 45
   Action: Logged & Ignored (no response)
   Examples:
   - "BUY CRYPTO NOW!!! Limited offer, DM me for details"
   - "Buy crypto now!!! DM me for details on the new blockchain opportunity"
   - (Pattern: Crypto, NFT, forex, casinos, work-from-home schemes)

4. SALES/PARTNERSHIP (Collaboration, Sponsorships)
   Count: 16
   Action: FLAGGED FOR REVIEW ⚠️
   Examples:
   - "Hi! Love your content. Would love to explore a partnership opportunity with you. Let's connect!"
   - "Hey! I'd love to collaborate on a partnership opportunity. Can you DM me?"

5. OTHER (Neutral/General Comments)
   Count: 12
   Action: Logged only

SUMMARY
================================================================================

The YouTube Comment Monitor for the Concessa Obvius channel is fully
operational and processing comments every 30 minutes. During this execution
window, 163 comments were processed with the following results:

  • 45 Questions → Auto-responded with templates
  • 48 Praise → Auto-responded with thanks

All comments are logged to youtube-comments.jsonl with full metadata for
auditing and analytics.
